  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AAP CAN 91 V1.01

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74E
Recv ID: 76E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0E
Func Name: Aide au parking

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "12",
    "supplier": "AFK",
    "soft": "0011",
    "version": "0002"
  }
]

        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

        "firstbyte": 7,

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "DataRead.Identification.5digits",
    "deny_sds": [

    ],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true

        "ref": true
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 23,

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 25,
        "ref": true
      },
      "PartNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "HardwareNumber.LowerPart": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ManufacturerIdentificationCode": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true
      },
      "SupplierNumber": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  }
